summary: Completed testing of Slot Manager calendar redesign and Public Booking error fix. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Slot Manager calendar view implemented correctly with resources as columns and time slots as rows
Date navigation (Today, Day, Week, Month) buttons working correctly
Work Order button opens booking modal with correct form fields
Public booking error handling fixed - Pydantic validation errors now display as text, not objects
Short URL route /b/:token works correctly for public booking
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slot Manager redesigned to calendar view. Public booking error fix verified - error messages now display as text. Short URL /b/:token works. Embed token for testing: 5a37cfb5-7511-4e8b-b972-07e8f0011e4c

slot_manager_calendar_view.details: Calendar-style view with resources (Stylist 1, Stylist 2) as columns and time slots (9:00 am - 8:30 pm) as rows

date_navigation.details: Today button, Day/Week/Month view buttons, left/right date navigation arrows all working

work_order_button.details: Green 'Work Order' button opens booking modal with Customer Name, Phone Number, Service dropdown, Vehicle Number fields

outlet_selector.details: Outlet dropdown selector in header allows switching between configured outlets

empty_slot_click.details: Clicking on empty time slot opens booking modal for that resource and time

public_booking_page_loads.details: Public booking page loads without React child error at /book/{token}

public_booking_error_handling.details: Pydantic validation errors display as text ('Field required') not as objects

short_url_route.details: Short URL /b/:token (e.g., /b/5a37cfb5) correctly loads public booking page

public_booking_api.details: POST /api/public/book creates booking successfully with proper validation

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/slot-configs - Returns configs with resources array for calendar columns
GET /api/outlets - Returns outlets for dropdown selector
GET /api/resource-bookings/{outlet_id}?date={date} - Returns bookings for calendar view
GET /api/public/slot-config/{token} - Returns config for public booking (full and short token)
POST /api/public/book - Creates public booking with validation
frontend_pages_tested: Slot Manager - Calendar view with resources as columns, time as rows, Work Order button
Public Booking - Multi-step form with error handling fix

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database - no mocked endpoints
